description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a rectangular layout, surrounded by a row of tall palm trees that create a lush, tropical atmosphere. The exterior is characterized by large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and wooden paneling, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The front facade includes a covered porch area with a transparent railing, providing a shaded outdoor living space. A driveway leads to a detached garage structure on one side, with a paved walkway connecting the entrance to the main building. The landscaping is minimalist, with clean lines and open spaces, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall design is sleek and open, with a focus on blending the structure into its natural surroundings.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass windows, wooden paneling, and a surrounding row of palm trees, featuring a covered porch and detached garage.
description_view_0: Top-down angled view showing the flat roof, surrounding palm trees, and the layout of the main building with the detached garage visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large glass windows, covered porch, and the row of palm trees lining the facade.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the bungalow, the continuation of the palm tree row, and the connection between the main building and garage.
description_view_3: Back view showing the garage entrance, paved driveway, and the rear facade with additional windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade
